name: PMFBY (Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana)
benefit: Crop insurance against natural calamities, pests and diseases.
eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas.
apply: Through banks, CSCs, or the PMFBY portal (pmfby.gov.in).

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
benefit: Short-term, low-interest credit for crops and allied activities.
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers, tenant farmers, sharecroppers.
apply: Through any commercial/cooperative bank or via the KCC portal.

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
benefit: Free soil testing and crop-wise nutrient recommendations.
apply: At the local agriculture office or soilhealth.dac.gov.in.

name: PM-KISAN
benefit: Income support of Rs 6000/year in three instalments.
apply: Through pmkisan.gov.in or the local revenue/agriculture office.

name: Punjab Crop Residue Management Subsidy
benefit: Subsidy on machinery to manage paddy straw without burning.
eligibility: Farmers and custom hiring centres in Punjab.
apply: Through the Punjab Agriculture Department portal.
